characters.girl: a girl in striped pajamas with a small flashlight
characters.sister: her older sister with a green scarf

scenes.title: The Light
scenes.background_prompt: A child's bedroom at night, a bed with pillows, a small table beside it, a window showing darkness outside with a faint glow. Cozy room, dim lighting. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A child's bedroom at night. A girl in striped pajamas stands by the window, holding a small flashlight he grabbed from the small table next to his bed. A strange glow is visible through the window outside. His older sister with a green scarf stands at the door, having just followed her. Dim room, nighttime.

ENP: small table next to his bed

scenes.title: The Garden
scenes.background_prompt: A dark garden at night seen from a back door. Bushes, a path leading deeper into the garden, long shadows. Moonlight. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A dark garden at night. A girl in striped pajamas shines a small flashlight ahead, making long shadows on the bushes. Her older sister with a green scarf stands beside her near the back door. A large glowing firefly floats just ahead of them on the path, moving toward the back of the garden. Moonlight, dark sky.

A: firefly moves toward back of garden

scenes.title: The Path
scenes.background_prompt: A narrow path between thick bushes at night, a tree root across the path, a rusty metal gate barely visible at the end. Moonlight filtering through. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A narrow path between thick bushes at night. The older sister with a green scarf has tripped on a root. The girl in striped pajamas helps her up. A green scarf lies on the ground. A large glowing firefly floats above a rusty gate at the end of the path, waiting. Moonlight.

SC: that they have never seen before

scenes.title: The Greenhouse
scenes.background_prompt: Inside an old greenhouse at night, cracked glass walls, vines growing on the frame, strange plants with big leaves, soft golden light filling the air. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: Inside an old greenhouse at night. Dozens of glowing fireflies fill the air with soft golden light. A girl in striped pajamas holds out his hand, and one large glowing firefly has landed on it. Her older sister with a green scarf looks around in wonder. Cracked glass walls, vines, strange plants with big leaves growing everywhere.

scenes.title: The Secret
scenes.background_prompt: A child's bedroom at night, same as scene 1. A bed with a pillow, a small table, the window now showing a faint glow in the distance. Cozy, dim. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A child's bedroom at night. A girl in striped pajamas sits on her bed drawing a map on paper. A pillow is lifted showing where she will hide the map. Her older sister with a green scarf around her neck sits beside her, smiling. The green scarf is slightly dirty. The window shows a faint glow in the distance outside.

P: plan to come back tomorrow night
